category_sources: source_facts.description says terminal based presentation tool; official site says Slides in your terminal and documents markdown-based presentations.
display_name_sources: Official site heading uses “Slides”; source_facts.name is slides.
docs_sources: Official site contains installation, usage, keybindings, search, code execution, preprocessing, configuration, SSH, and development links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/maaslalani/slides, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site describe terminal presentations using markdown, CLI execution, and slide configuration.
